mapper.select: SELECT * FROM repair_material ORDER BY material_name
SELECT * FROM repair_material WHERE stock_quantity < #{threshold} ORDER BY stock_quantity
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO repair_material (material_name, material_code, category, unit, unit_price, stock_quantity, supplier, remark, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{materialName}, #{materialCode}, #{category}, #{unit}, #{unitPrice}, #{stockQuantity}, #{supplier}, #{remark}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE repair_material SET material_name = #{materialName}, material_code = #{materialCode}, category = #{category}, unit = #{unit}, unit_price = #{unitPrice}, stock_quantity = #{stockQuantity}, supplier = #{supplier}, remark = #{remark}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE repair_material SET stock_quantity = stock_quantity + #{quantity}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT category FROM repair_material WHERE category IS NOT NULL ORDER BY category
